name_en: 🔮🔮🔮OHANEL🚩🚩🚩Vintage Calfskin Custom Leather, super retro in person. My favorite autumn/winter suede Chanel. It's firmly number one in my heart because it's so unique and rare. Chocolate brown with double pockets and a chain strap. This was the first Chanel that attracted me to the brand. It gathers all the suede styles I love. Crossbody tote, adjustable chain ⛓️. These five major elements appear in many similar styles, but this suede brown is the one that hits me the most. The leather looks like cowhide texture but feels like thick matte suede. The chain allows for a shoulder bag style. Lightweight, fits a laptop + iPad! Dimensions: 28x12.5x24cm
